design_style: Y2K Acid Graphics / Vibrant Neo-Brutalist / Flat 3D Pop Art

typography.header_font_style: Ultra-Bold Extended Sans-Serif / Heavy Grotesque Display
typography.layout_logic: Symmetrical outer framing with asymmetrical staggered interior elements
text_effects: Extreme scale contrast between headline and body text
Bilingual hierarchy (English as primary graphical element, Chinese as functional subtitle)

geometry: Angled tab cuts with sharp corners
textures: Photorealistic crumpled paper / plastic wrap overlay
motifs: Minimalist linear geometric icon bounded by a thin rectangle

compositional_rules.spacing: Top-heavy typographic anchor with a centralized, floating mid-ground graphic
compositional_rules.depth: 2.5D spatial layering achieved through offset stacking and contrasting border colors to simulate thickness
compositional_rules.hierarchy: Visual dominance driven by color contrast (Header) -> Structural layering (Folders) -> Anchored Base (Footer)
compositional_rules.alignment: Full-width justified optical alignment for the header, center-aligned overall lockup, flush-left typography within individual folder tabs
